name: MAREF Governance
description: Multi-Agent Recursive Evolution Framework governance enforcement. Intercepts file writes and command execution to enforce policies via a MAREF sidecar.

failClosed.description: Block operations when sidecar is unreachable (enforcing mode only)

cacheTtlMs.description: TTL for cached allow decisions in ms (default: 30000, 0 to disable)

cacheBlockTtlMs.description: TTL for cached block decisions in ms (default: 60000, 0 to disable)
